title: Diploma in Electrical Engineering | Galgotias University
content: Diploma in Electrical Engineering is a three year program taught over a period of six semesters. The primary objective is to train the students as competent electrical engineers and make them meet the requirement of industries besides striving for further improvement in academic performance of students. In the first semester, basics of science and scientific theories of Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics applied to engineering studies courses and respective laboratories will be taught, so that student can apply basic theories of science in electrical engineering. In every semester there will be some core courses and respective laboratories of electrical engineering. Samsung C&T, in collaboration with Galgotias University and NGO partner NABET India, is offering full tuition fee scholarships under Project Build for Nation for students enrolling in Diploma (Lateral Entry) programs in Mechanical, Civil, and Electrical Engineering. The initiative also includes a 2-year certified AutoCAD training to enhance industry readiness. 10th with minimum 40% marks. For Lateral Entry: Or 10th (minimum 40%) + 2 year ITI (minimum 40%) shall be eligible for admission to Second Year Diploma Course(s) in Any branch of Engineering and Technology. The three year Diploma in Electrical Engineering Program is taught over a period of six semesters. In first semester basic science theory as well as laboratory courses will be taught so that the students can apply basic theories of physics, chemistry and mathematics in Electrical Engineering core courses. In every semester there will be some core courses and related. Some of the Core Modules of the program are Electrical Technology, Electromagnetic Field Theory, Digital Electronics, Network Analysis, Electrical Machines, Electrical Instruments and Measurements, Power System, Electrical Drawing, Microprocessor, Micro Controller, Electrical Estimation and Costing, Trouble Shooting and Maintenance of Electrical equipments, Electrical Engineering Materials, Utilization of Electrical Energy, Power Plant Engineering, and Project Work etc. Program Structure01 Basic knowledge: An ability to apply knowledge of basic mathematics, science, and engineering to solve engineering problems. 02 Discipline knowledge: An ability to apply discipline-specific knowledge to solve core and/or applied engineering problems. 03 04 05 06 07 08 09 Communication: An ability to communicate effectively. 10 01 The graduates will be academically prepared to use modern and innovative tools and will contribute effectively to the growth and development of their respective organization. 02 The graduates will engage in multidisciplinary professional activities including ethical practices to simultaneously contribute to the profession and the society at large. 03 The graduates will be able to recognize the importance of self-improvement and be committed to lifelong learning while enhancing their own growth. 01 The ability to apply Electrical engineering principles to multidisciplinary problem-solving in areas such as energy, biomedicine, materials and the environment with safety and environmental aspects. 02 The ability to do experimental research and simulations in the design and operation of process plant engineering systems. 03 The ability to enhance engineering skills and knowledge through industrial exposure by training, projects and applications of Electrical engineering software. 10th with minimum 40% marks. For Lateral Entry: Or 10th (minimum 40%) + 2 year ITI (minimum 40%) shall be eligible for admission to Second Year Diploma Course(s) in Any branch of Engineering and Technology.
